title: CACOON - 211info
text: LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH CACOON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Public health nurse home visiting program that provides support to families with children and youth with special health care needs. Home visitors help families coordinate care for their children, connect with healthcare, community support, and make sure their child’s health team works together. Helps prepare older youth with special health needs for the transition to adulthood. 255 SW Coast Highway Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Families with children and youth ages 0-21 with chronic health or developmental conditions Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 265-4112 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 265-4112 Main phone Main phone (541) 265-4112 Intake (541) 265-0457 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish and interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: Case/Care Management * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Home Based Parenting Education * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Specialized Information and Referral * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HIV/HEPATITIS C TESTING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
